requirement_topic.en: EMC — IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 for PV Inverters — Kahramaa Specification

summary.en: Kahramaa's Technical Specifications for the Connection of Solar PV Systems to the Network (EP-EPP-P7-S1) explicitly references IEC 62920 (Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment) and IEC 61000-3-2 (Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions) as required technical evidence for PV inverters. IEC 62920 is the dedicated EMC standard for PV power conversion equipment; IEC 61000-3-2 sets harmonic current emission limits for equipment with input current up to and including 16 A per phase. No standalone QGOSM EMC Technical Regulation specifically for solar inverters has been identified; EMC requirements for Qatar PV inverters are embedded in the Kahramaa grid-connection specification.
summary.zh: Kahramaa《太阳能光伏系统接入电网技术规格》（EP-EPP-P7-S1）明确引用IEC 62920（光伏发电系统——功率变换设备的电磁兼容要求和测试方法）和IEC 61000-3-2（电磁兼容——谐波电流排放限值）作为光伏逆变器的必要技术证据。IEC 62920是光伏功率变换设备的专用EMC标准；IEC 61000-3-2规定了每相输入电流不超过16 A的设备的谐波电流排放限值。目前尚未发现专门针对太阳能逆变器的独立QGOSM EMC技术法规；卡塔尔光伏逆变器的EMC要求包含在Kahramaa并网规格中。
summary.zht: Kahramaa《太陽能光伏系統接入電網技術規格》（EP-EPP-P7-S1）明確引用IEC 62920（光伏發電系統——功率轉換設備的電磁相容要求和測試方法）和IEC 61000-3-2（電磁相容——諧波電流排放限值）作為光伏逆變器的必要技術證據。IEC 62920是光伏功率轉換設備的專用EMC標準；IEC 61000-3-2規定了每相輸入電流不超過16 A的設備的諧波電流排放限值。目前尚未發現專門針對太陽能逆變器的獨立QGOSM EMC技術法規；卡達光伏逆變器的EMC要求包含在Kahramaa併網規格中。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment (explicitly cited in Kahramaa EP-EPP-P7-S1)
IEC 61000-3-2 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions (equipment with input current up to 16 A per phase) (explicitly cited in Kahramaa EP-EPP-P7-S1)

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC is assessed under GB/T 37408-2019 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters), which includes EMC test requirements aligned with China's domestic framework. GB/T 37408 EMC testing is conducted at CNAS-accredited Chinese laboratories. While IEC 62920 draws on IEC 61000-series test methods used in Chinese domestic standards, the GB/T 37408 EMC test scope and referenced limits are not harmonised with IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 as applied by Kahramaa. Chinese EMC certificates based solely on GB/T 37408 are not accepted as IEC 62920 or IEC 61000-3-2 compliance evidence for Kahramaa project submissions.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC依据GB/T 37408-2019（光伏并网逆变器技术要求）进行评估，其中包含与中国国内框架相符的EMC测试要求。GB/T 37408 EMC测试在中国CNAS认可实验室进行。尽管IEC 62920借鉴了中国国内标准中使用的IEC 61000系列测试方法，但GB/T 37408 EMC测试范围和引用限值未与IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2协调，不被Kahramaa接受为IEC 62920或IEC 61000-3-2的合规证据。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC依據GB/T 37408-2019（光伏並網逆變器技術要求）進行評估，其中包含與中國國內框架相符的EMC測試要求。GB/T 37408 EMC測試在中國CNAS認可實驗室進行。儘管IEC 62920借鑑了中國國內標準中使用的IEC 61000系列測試方法，但GB/T 37408 EMC測試範圍和引用限值未與IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2協調，不被Kahramaa接受為IEC 62920或IEC 61000-3-2的合規證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2019 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters) — includes EMC test requirements

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 37408 EMC testing does not satisfy Kahramaa's IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 requirements. Exporters should obtain: (a) IEC 62920 EMC type-test report from an ILAC-accredited laboratory covering the specific inverter model; (b) IEC 61000-3-2 harmonic current emission test report for the model. These reports should be specific to the power rating and configuration of the inverter being supplied to Qatar. Where harmonics test results were obtained under Chinese grid conditions (220/380 V), consider whether retesting under Qatar grid conditions (240/415 V, 50 Hz) is required by the Kahramaa project engineer.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 37408 EMC测试不满足Kahramaa的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2要求。出口商应取得：（a）来自ILAC认可实验室、涵盖所供应特定逆变器型号的IEC 62920 EMC型式试验报告；（b）该型号的IEC 61000-3-2谐波电流排放测试报告。上述报告应针对供应至卡塔尔的逆变器功率等级和配置。若谐波测试结果在中国电网条件（220/380 V）下获取，应与Kahramaa项目工程师确认是否需要在卡塔尔电网条件（240/415 V、50 Hz）下重新测试。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 37408 EMC測試不滿足Kahramaa的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2要求。出口商應取得：（a）來自ILAC認可實驗室、涵蓋所供應特定逆變器型號的IEC 62920 EMC型式試驗報告；（b）該型號的IEC 61000-3-2諧波電流排放測試報告。上述報告應針對供應至卡達的逆變器功率等級和配置。若諧波測試結果在中國電網條件（220/380 V）下取得，應與Kahramaa項目工程師確認是否需要在卡達電網條件（240/415 V、50 Hz）下重新測試。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for Kahramaa grid-connection project submission where EP-EPP-P7-S1 applies; IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 evidence are explicit requirements in the specification
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary — GB/T 37408 EMC testing is a requirement for voluntary CQC/CGC certification; not a standalone mandatory market-access requirement for domestic China PV inverters

source.publisher: Kahramaa (Qatar General Electricity and Water Corporation)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 37408 EMC certificates do not satisfy Kahramaa's IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 requirements. Obtain IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 type-test reports from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for the specific inverter model before project submission to Kahramaa. Confirm whether Qatar grid voltage conditions (240/415 V) require retesting compared to test results obtained under 220/380 V Chinese grid conditions.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 37408 EMC证书不满足Kahramaa的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2要求。在向Kahramaa提交项目前，须从ILAC认可实验室取得特定逆变器型号的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2型式试验报告。请确认卡塔尔电网电压条件（240/415 V）是否需要相较于中国220/380 V电网条件下的测试结果重新测试。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 37408 EMC證書不滿足Kahramaa的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2要求。在向Kahramaa提交項目前，須從ILAC認可實驗室取得特定逆變器型號的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2型式試驗報告。請確認卡達電網電壓條件（240/415 V）是否需要相較於中國220/380 V電網條件下的測試結果重新測試。
